availableProperties.name: Exe Hotel Colón
availableProperties.detail: Located right in the heart of Buenos Aires, offering tasteful suites overlooking the Obelisk and Avenida 9 de Julio. Be sure to book a 'Double Room, City View' or suite and ask for a guaranteed Obelisk view.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Exe Hotel Colón Carlos Pellegrini 507 Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Bristol Hotel Buenos Aires
availableProperties.detail: Stands directly beside Plaza de la República, offering standard and superior city-view rooms. Highly recommended to reserve a 'Superior Room with City View' on a high floor and request a guaranteed Obelisk-facing room.

availableProperties.name: Ideal Social Hostel
availableProperties.detail: A budget-friendly hostel option located incredibly close to the Obelisk (less than 2 blocks away). Shared dorm beds start at just $15, while private rooms are available from $40. Perfect for solo travelers or backpackers who want to be right at the center of the World Cup celebrations without spending a fortune.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Ideal Social Hostel Suipacha 355 Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Hotel NH Buenos Aires Latino
availableProperties.detail: Located just 1.5 blocks from the Obelisk. Excellent quality and service. Front-facing rooms on upper floors offer side/partial views of the Obelisk and Av. 9 de Julio. Highly recommended for a comfortable stay close to the action.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Hotel NH Buenos Aires Latino Suipacha 309 Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Hotel NH Buenos Aires Tango
availableProperties.detail: Offers an exceptional location right in front of the Obelisk. Many rooms feature prominent views of Avenida 9 de Julio and the Obelisk. Ask for a high-floor, front-facing room with a balcony to enjoy the views of the monument.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: NH Buenos Aires Tango Cerrito 550 Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Obelisco Hoteles
availableProperties.detail: Extremely close to the Obelisk (less than 3 blocks). However, please note that it has a very low guest rating of 2.0/5.0. Recommended only if closeness to the Obelisk is your absolute priority and other options are booked.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Obelisco Hoteles Bernardo de Irigoyen 117 Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: ibis Buenos Aires Obelisco
availableProperties.detail: A highly popular budget option located directly on Av. Corrientes, just 3 blocks from the Obelisk. Rooms on higher floors facing Av. Corrientes have clear sightlines down the street directly to the Obelisk. Excellent value.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: ibis Buenos Aires Obelisco Av. Corrientes 1344 Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Novotel Buenos Aires
availableProperties.detail: Located right next to the ibis, this 4-star hotel features modern rooms and an outdoor pool. Front-facing rooms on high floors offer fantastic views of Av. Corrientes and the Obelisk. A great mid-range option.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Novotel Buenos Aires Av. Corrientes 1334 Buenos Aires

availableProperties.name: Gran Hotel Argentino
availableProperties.detail: Situated directly on Carlos Pellegrini (the side street of the massive Av. 9 de Julio), less than 5 blocks from the Obelisk. Some front-facing rooms offer direct views of the avenue, perfect for watching the celebrations.
availableProperties.mapsQuery: Gran Hotel Argentino Carlos Pellegrini 37 Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Ventanas al Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: A sister apartment to the Ventana al Obelisco listing, also directly opposite the monument with an advertised window view.

soldOutProperties.name: Ventana al Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Located directly opposite the Obelisk with soundproof windows; features a stunning straight-on view from the bedroom window.

soldOutProperties.name: Corazón Obelisco 1 (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Eighth-floor apartment directly facing the Obelisk; guest reviews specifically praise the view from the window.

soldOutProperties.name: Amazing, New. Obelisk View - MateHost (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Unusually large four-bedroom property for groups, with several private balconies and Obelisk views; accommodates 16+ guests.

soldOutProperties.name: Obelisco Sky Suite (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: A luxury room located on the 25th floor with a direct panoramic Obelisk view through wall-to-wall windows. Unmatched perspective.

soldOutProperties.name: Unique Apartment Facing the Obelisk (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Advertises a spectacular Obelisk view from the living-room window. Soundproofed and centrally located.

soldOutProperties.name: Baires Obelisk Studio (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Studio advertising an Obelisk view through large floor-to-ceiling windows. Guest favorite.

soldOutProperties.name: Magical View of the Obelisk (11A) (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Bright and cozy designer apartment on the 11th floor with a balcony directly facing the monument and Av. 9 de Julio.

soldOutProperties.name: Apartment with Obelisk View (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Compact studio directly facing the Obelisk with what the listing calls an 'unbeatable view'. Marked in the top 5% of homes.

soldOutProperties.name: Deluxe Downtown Apartment (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Deluxe apartment with a direct private-balcony view of the Obelisk. Rated a perfect 5.0.

soldOutProperties.name: Balcones al Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Private balcony immediately facing the Obelisk. Perfect for viewing the street celebrations.

soldOutProperties.name: The Best View of the Obelisk in BA (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: The bedroom directly overlooks the Obelisk with double-glazed hermetic windows keeping out the noise.

soldOutProperties.name: Views from the Heart of Buenos Aires (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Large windows overlooking Avenida 9 de Julio and the Obelisk area. Rated 4.99 and marked among the top 5% of homes.

soldOutProperties.name: Obelisco 3 / Vista del Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Features two bedrooms and two balconies with a direct, unobstructed view of the monument.

soldOutProperties.name: Vista Icónica del Obelisco (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: A spacious two-bedroom apartment where one bedroom explicitly has a direct Obelisk view through its windows.

soldOutProperties.name: Vistas al Obelisco, Corazón de BA (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Broad interior windows facing the Obelisk; the bedrooms also connect to a balcony. Accommodates up to 6 guests.

soldOutProperties.name: Vista al Obelisco — 6 huéspedes (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: The Obelisk is visible from the bedroom windows. No balcony, making it one of the clearest straight-on window-only views.

soldOutProperties.name: Amazing 18th Floor Apartment (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Two-level duplex apartment on the 17th and 18th floors; both levels have large windows overlooking the Obelisk and Teatro Colón.

soldOutProperties.name: Buenos Aires from Above (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Wide city panorama extending from the Obelisk toward the Río de la Plata. Exceptionally well-reviewed Franco-Porteño style studio.

soldOutProperties.name: Broadway Hotel & Suites
soldOutProperties.detail: An Art Deco hotel located just 50 meters from the Obelisk. Features a rooftop pool and rooms with stunning views of the monument. Fully booked.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: Broadway Hotel & Suites Av. Corrientes 1173 Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Grand Brizo Buenos Aires
soldOutProperties.detail: Home to the famous 'Cielo Sky Bar' on the rooftop, offering direct, breathtaking views of the Obelisk. Many rooms also feature direct avenue and monument views. Fully booked.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: Grand Brizo Buenos Aires Cerrito 180 Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Globales República
soldOutProperties.detail: Located literally in front of the Obelisk. Its front-facing rooms offer the most direct, front-row view of the monument and the surrounding plaza. Fully booked.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: Hotel Globales República Cerrito 370 Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Penthouse con Terraza (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: Two-bedroom penthouse with a terrace and approximately 270° views of the Obelisk, 9 de Julio, and Corrientes.

soldOutProperties.name: Marriott Buenos Aires
soldOutProperties.detail: One of the most iconic luxury hotels in BA, featuring a glass-enclosed rooftop pool and terrace with panoramic views of the Obelisk. Rooms facing the avenue have unmatched direct views. Fully booked.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: Marriott Buenos Aires Carlos Pellegrini 551 Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: El Misti Coliving Obelisco
soldOutProperties.detail: A highly rated coliving and hotel option located right on Av. Corrientes. Features modern, spacious rooms with air conditioning and city views. Many rooms overlook Avenida 9 de Julio and the Obelisk. Fully booked on Booking.com for this date.
soldOutProperties.mapsQuery: El Misti Coliving Obelisco Av. Corrientes 1122 Buenos Aires

soldOutProperties.name: Flat Floor 22 View of the Obelisk (Airbnb)
soldOutProperties.detail: 22nd-floor apartment advertising an unobstructed Obelisk view through large interior glazing. Highly rated by guests.
